title: Fix Registration Step 2: Auto-trigger Internet Identity & Redirect to Home After Registration

requirements.summary: Auto-trigger Internet Identity popup when user reaches Step 2 without requiring manual button click
acceptanceCriteria: When user completes Step 1 and proceeds to Step 2, the Internet Identity popup opens automatically without any button click
No manual 'Connect with Internet Identity' button interaction is required to trigger the popup
The useEffect dependency correctly watches for step === 2 transition

file_operations.description: Add a useEffect hook that automatically triggers the Internet Identity login flow when step transitions to 2. The effect should call the login function from useInternetIdentity hook immediately when step === 2. Verify the useInternetIdentity hook's usage instructions before implementing. Include proper dependency array [step, login] and ensure the effect only fires once per step transition by adding a guard to prevent multiple invocations.

requirements.summary: Fix stuck 'Connecting...' loading state on Step 2 by resetting button state on authentication failure or cancellation
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Connecting...' spinner does not remain stuck indefinitely
If Internet Identity login is cancelled or fails, the button resets to a clickable retry state
No permanent loading state is shown after a failed or cancelled authentication attempt

file_operations.description: Wrap the Internet Identity login call in a try-catch block within the auto-trigger useEffect. On catch, reset any local connecting/loading state variables to allow retry. Ensure the loginStatus from useInternetIdentity is properly monitored, and if loginStatus indicates failure or the promise rejects, the UI reverts to an actionable state. Add error handling that clears connecting state and optionally displays an error message to the user, prompting them to retry authentication.

requirements.summary: Redirect user to Home Page ('/') after successful registration completion (Step 3 - Done)
acceptanceCriteria: After registration is fully completed (Step 3 reached and backend registration confirmed), the user is automatically redirected to '/' (Home Page)
The redirect happens without requiring any additional user interaction after Step 3

file_operations.description: Add navigation logic using the useNavigate hook from react-router-dom. When step 3 is reached and the backend registration mutation is successful (after saveCallerUserProfile completes), immediately call navigate('/') to redirect the user to the Home Page. Ensure the redirect is conditional on successful completion of all registration steps and backend confirmation, preventing premature navigation. Optionally, add a short delay or success message display before redirecting to improve UX.
